name: The Tipsy Mystery
original_name: ฆาตกรรมจำไม่ได้
overview: When a wild night at the notorious Paradise Seven party ends with Bam found dead, famous spirit medium Phing is pulled into a twisted murder mystery involving four prime suspects. Lieutenant Dan takes charge of the investigation, secrets, lies, and suspicions collide, and Phing must piece together the truth from fractured memories—both living and dead—before the killer gets away.

trailers.title: ซีรีส์ ฆาตกรรมจำไม่ได้ | OFFICIAL TRAILER | oneD ORIGINAL
